display.purpose: Hero headlines and the one big statement per page. Fraunces 700.

title.purpose: Card names, subsection heads, editorial eyebrows. Fraunces 700.

body.purpose: All reading text, 65 to 75ch measure. Inter 400.

label.purpose: Chips, badges, metadata, uppercase eyebrows. Inter 600.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Resting cards and raised surfaces. Warm terracotta tint, never grey.

shadows.name: stamp
shadows.purpose: Hard ink offset paired with translate(-2px,-2px) on card hover. The block-print signature.

shadows.name: soft-dark
shadows.purpose: Dark-mode resting shadow on charcoal canvas.

motion.name: t-fast
motion.purpose: State changes: card stamp, button press, heart fill.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Highest-intent action per surface: rose fill, cream text, darkens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #B5365B; color: #FFF6E5; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms ease, transform 100ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8E2A48; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1F5F3C; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Lower-intent action (List your profile): cream-tint fill, leaf text and hairline.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #FBEBC8; color: #1F5F3C; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(31,95,60,0.30); border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F4E5C0; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1F5F3C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: City Pill
components.description: Signature control announcing the city the whole page is scoped to. At least 44px tall.
components.css: .ds-city-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 44px; background: #FBEBC8; color: #1F5F3C; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; padding: 7px 16px; border: 1px solid #1F5F3C; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-city-pill:hover { background: #F4E5C0; }

components.name: Discovery Card
components.description: Listing card on khadi cream with a leaf hairline. Block-print stamp on hover.
components.html:
Aisha Crochet
Indiranagar, Bengaluru
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; background: #FFF6E5; border: 1px solid rgba(31,95,60,0.30); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(180,80,40,0.10); overflow: hidden; transition: transform 100ms ease, box-shadow 100ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translate(-2px,-2px); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #1A1A1A; } .ds-card-img { aspect-ratio: 1/1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FBEBC8, #F4E5C0); } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px 14px 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; color: #1A1A1A; } .ds-card-loc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; color: #6B5A3E; margin-top: 3px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-card { transition: none; } .ds-card:hover { transform: none; } }

components.name: Save Heart
components.description: Circular rose-on-cream save button on a card corner. Visual 36px, 44px tap target via overlay.
components.html: <button class="ds-heart" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Save"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="15" height="15" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 21s-7.5-4.6-10-9.2C.6 8.9 2.1 5.5 5.3 5.5c2 0 3.3 1.2 4.7 3 1.4-1.8 2.7-3 4.7-3 3.2 0 4.7 3.4 3.3 6.3C19.5 16.4 12 21 12 21z" fill="none" stroke="#B5365B" stroke-width="2"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-heart { position: relative; width: 36px; height: 36px; display: grid; place-items: center; border: none; border-radius: 50%; background: #FFF6E5; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); cursor: pointer; } .ds-heart::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -4px; } .ds-heart[aria-pressed="true"] svg path { fill: #B5365B; } .ds-heart:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1F5F3C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Cream-filled field with a leaf hairline; focus shifts toward rose with a soft ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Search crochet, yarn, pottery" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #FFF6E5; color: #1A1A1A; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(31,95,60,0.30); border-radius: 10px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6E5C41; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid transparent; outline-offset: 2px; border-color: #B5365B; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(181,54,91,0.18); }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Pill tag for craft categories and metadata: cream-tint fill, walnut text.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #FBEBC8; color: #6B5A3E; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; }

narrative.overview: Crafty looks like a weekend craft market at golden hour, not a software product. The whole system is built on warm khadi cream (#FFF6E5) rather than white, lit by four named market colours: a deep rose for action, banana-leaf green for structure, marigold for accents, and indigo as a rare cool note. Type is editorial, with Fraunces carrying display and titles like hand-set signage above each stall, and Inter handling calm, readable body. Depth is soft and terracotta-tinted, never cold grey. The defining gesture is a printer's stamp: cards lift two pixels up and left on hover and cast a hard ink-coloured offset, like a block print pressed into paper. The register is product, but the discovery surfaces are dressed with brand warmth so buyers feel they are browsing a neighbourhood, not querying a database.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream canvas, never pure white or pure black.
A four-colour market palette (rose, leaf, marigold, indigo) over cream.
Editorial serif (Fraunces) for voice, humanist sans (Inter) for reading.
Block-print stamp hover instead of soft float.
Entity cards intentionally vary in shape so the eye reads four distinct rails.

rules.name: The Cream-Not-White Rule
rules.body: Every surface is khadi cream or a cream tint. Pure #FFFFFF and pure #000000 are forbidden. Neutrals are warm walnut browns, not greys.

rules.name: The Four-Stall Rule
rules.body: Rose, leaf, marigold, indigo each have one job (action, structure, festive accent, rare cool note). Never introduce a fifth hue or let one colour take another's role.

rules.name: The Loaded-Font Rule
rules.body: Fraunces and Inter must actually load via next/font. system-ui and Georgia may appear only as terminal fallbacks, never the primary face. A page in Georgia or system sans is a bug.

rules.name: The Serif-Voice Rule
rules.body: Fraunces carries identity (display, titles, names, eyebrows). Inter carries information (body, labels, forms).

rules.name: The Block-Print Rule
rules.body: Interactive cards stamp on hover: translate -2/-2, hard ink offset shadow, 100ms ease, wrapped in a reduced-motion guard. No soft glow, no scale, no grey lift.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are terracotta-tinted in light mode (rgba(180,80,40,...)), deep black in dark mode. A cold grey resting shadow is forbidden.

dos: Do sit everything on khadi cream (#FFF6E5); use warm walnut browns (#6B5A3E) for muted text, never grey.
Do load Fraunces and Inter through next/font; treat Georgia and system-ui as terminal fallbacks only.
Do use the block-print Stamp hover on cards (translate -2/-2 + hard ink offset, 100ms), wrapped in a reduced-motion guard.
Do keep terracotta-tinted shadows (rgba(180,80,40,...)) in light mode.
Do vary card shape by entity type so each rail reads as its own category.
Do give bazaar-rose double duty: primary fills and inline emphasis text (it clears AA on cream at about 5.4:1).
Do keep heart counts and popularity private; show the maker and the work, not the metric.
donts: Don't use #fff or #000, or any cold neutral grey for text or surfaces.
Don't ship the page in Georgia or system-ui; a missing Fraunces or Inter is a bug.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text on a gradient), ever.
Don't use a border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured accent stripe.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) as a default surface treatment.
Don't build a hero-metric block or an identical icon-card grid.
Don't reach for a modal first; exhaust inline and progressive disclosure.
Don't write em dashes in UI copy; use commas, colons, or parentheses.
Don't look like Etsy, Instagram, or Justdial: no global storefront pressure, no infinite feed, no grey directory rows.
